basics.title: Senior Java Backend Engineer
basics.summary: Senior Java Backend Engineer with 5+ years of experience in building and modernizing scalable enterprise solutions. Expert in Java 21, Spring Boot 3.5, and the AWS ecosystem (ECS, Lambda, Bedrock). Proven track record in architecting AI-native platforms that reduced operational costs by $16,000+ monthly and automated manual efforts by 58%. Specialist in high-load migrations, event-driven architectures, and technical leadership within the Retail, Healthcare, Real Estate and IoT domains.

employment.description: Full-cycle software development, including architecture planning, API design, performance tuning, and legacy system optimization.
responsibilities: Led migration from Java 8/Spring Boot 2.2 to Java 21/Spring Boot 3.4, resolving critical dependency issues
Coordinated integration across 8 teams, ensuring smooth large-scale system transition
Mentored engineers and improved code quality, test coverage, and maintainability
Designed scalable data processing solutions and contributed to Spark jobs processing 4M records

employment.project: Real estate platform with AI-core and automated processes
employment.description: Architected and deployed a cost-optimized, AI-native platform on AWS, leveraging event-driven systems and automated pipelines.
responsibilities: Led AWS cloud architecture (Docker, Terraform, Fargate), delivering a cost-efficient MVP
Built AI-native platform core with event-driven architecture
Reduced AI processing costs by 35% via image deduplication (perceptual hashing)
Cut LLM usage costs through search optimization and caching

employment.project: AWS Bedrock AI Scheduling and Management Agent
employment.description: Led a cross-functional team during an internal EPAM AI Marathon to build an AWS Bedrock–powered AI Scheduling and Management Agent.
responsibilities: Led a technical team (1 DevOps, 4 Software Engineers)
Delivered a solution that reduced manual scheduling efforts by 58%
Coordinated team workflows and ensured timely delivery of a functional MVP
